_readme: チャンネル定義ファイル。アプリは1つ・設定はチャンネル別。api_env_prefix を設定すると、そのチャンネルは <PREFIX>_OPENAI_API_KEY / <PREFIX>_GEMINI_API_KEY / <PREFIX>_ANTHROPIC_API_KEY を優先使用（未設定なら共通キーにフォールバック）。Render の環境変数でキーを管理するとデプロイで消えず安全。

defaults.worldview_desc: Consistent warm, modern educational illustration world used throughout the whole video. Soft, cohesive color palette (warm tones with one calm accent color — not always blue). Clean flat-vector style with gentle shading, approachable and trustworthy mood. Keep the same character design, line weight, and palette across every scene so the video feels like one unified series.

ART STYLE / TONE (match this in EVERY illustration): a clean, simple, friendly FLAT CARTOON style like Japanese educational YouTube explainer videos. Thick, even, clean outlines. Flat cel-shading with minimal gradients and no heavy rendering. Soft rounded shapes, warm and approachable. Keep it SIMPLE and clean — do NOT make it detailed anime, do NOT make it semi-realistic, no heavy shadows or fine hatching. THE PROFESSOR (the channel's signature recurring character — use this EXACT design every time a teacher / professor / sensei / lecturer / explainer character appears): a friendly middle-aged Japanese man in his late 40s with a soft ROUNDED face and simple gentle features. Short dark-brown, slightly wavy and curly hair with a bit of volume on top. Thin dark rectangular eyeglasses. Small kind eyes and a gentle warm smile. Light skin. He ALWAYS wears a GRAY textured tweed blazer over a DARK RED (wine / maroon) V-neck sweater with a white collar. Warm, approachable, trustworthy teacher who often gestures with open hands as he explains. Keep his face, hairstyle, glasses, and gray-blazer-over-dark-red-sweater outfit IDENTICAL in every scene he appears in. A friendly young Japanese university student may appear as a secondary recurring character (same simple flat style). Palette: warm, trustworthy tones with one calm accent color (avoid all-blue monotony). Keep character design, line weight, color palette, and the simple flat-cartoon tone unified across every scene so the whole video looks like one cohesive series.

ART STYLE / TONE (match this in EVERY illustration): a clean, simple, readable FLAT illustration style for a serious-but-approachable geopolitics / world-history explainer channel about Russia, the USSR and its neighbors. Thick, even, clean outlines. Flat cel-shading with minimal gradients, no heavy rendering or photo-realism. Calm, documentary, trustworthy mood — informative rather than sensational. THE NARRATOR (the channel's signature recurring character — use this EXACT design every time a narrator / explainer / guide character appears; the attached reference image is the authoritative design when provided): keep the same face, hairstyle, build, clothing and color palette in every scene the character appears in, changing only pose, expression and background. SIGNAGE: any signs, shop signs, street signs, billboards, documents or text that naturally appear in a scene MUST be in the LOCAL LANGUAGE of the depicted place (Russian / Cyrillic for Russia or the USSR; the local language elsewhere). Do NOT put Japanese labels inside illustrations. PALETTE: serious, cohesive tones — deep navy as the main color with a calm muted red as the single accent (evokes the Russia theme without looking like propaganda). Keep character design, line weight, color palette and the simple flat tone unified across every scene so the whole video looks like one cohesive series.
